name: Abbott Laboratories
h1: Abbott Laboratories's GCC footprint in India
lede: Abbott Laboratories runs eight capability centers across six Indian cities. Mumbai, New Delhi, Bharuch, Solan, Bengaluru and Salcete, covering CoE, gbs, manufacturing and R&D, built over 24 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Abbott Laboratories office in India. We map eight, across six cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Abbott Laboratories GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Abbott Laboratories runs 8 verified GCC centers across 6 Indian cities (Mumbai, New Delhi, Bharuch, Solan, Bengaluru, Salcete), covering CoE, gbs, manufacturing and R&D. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

titles.title: DVP, Abbott and MD, Abbott India Limited

about.description: Abbott Laboratories's India footprint covers Mumbai, New Delhi, Bharuch, Solan, Bengaluru and Salcete, spanning CoE, gbs, manufacturing and R&D. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and Procurement for the group's global operations.
about.industry: General Healthcare Equipment, Medical Devices and Equipment

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 291 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Abbott Laboratories operate in India?
faq.a: Abbott Laboratories operates 8 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Abbott Laboratories have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Abbott Laboratories's India GCC footprint spans Mumbai, New Delhi, Bharuch, Solan, Bengaluru and Salcete.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Abbott Laboratories run in India?
faq.a: Abbott Laboratories runs CoE, gbs, manufacturing and R&D centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Abbott Laboratories's India GCCs?
faq.a: Abbott Laboratories's India centers employ in the 5,000 to 10,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Abbott Laboratories's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 291 leaders at Abbott Laboratories's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
